headline: Ange Postecoglou
body: 🚨🟡🔵 Ange Postecoglou signs a two year contract at Al Nassr as new head coach. 🇦🇺 Former Spurs and Celtic manager replaces Jorge Jesus as new Al Nassr coach with immediate effect.
raw_text:
🚨🟡🔵 Ange Postecoglou signs a two year contract at Al Nassr as new head coach. 🇦🇺

Former Spurs and Celtic manager replaces Jorge Jesus as new Al Nassr coach with immediate effect.
